title: Ingrid Hawthorne
content:
Ingrid Hawthorne (born in the late 1950s) is a former professional basketball player best known as captain of the Cindermark Storks when they won the Lakefront Championship Series in 1883.

Awards and honors.

Following the Lakefront Championship Series, Ingrid Hawthorne received Finals Most Valuable Player recognition and was named to the All-League first team.
